explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: SEC filings reiterate risks associated with AI use and indicate a policy-level commitment to managing these risks. Reports detail an AI Executive Steering Committee, an AI Governance Board, and an AI Security Policy, indicating a centralized governance structure.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This SEC filing, a Form 10-Q for Newell Brands INC, provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. The filing reiterates risks associated with AI use, indicating a policy-level commitment to managing these risks, which is a key aspect of AI governance.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-Q for Newell Brands INC filed 10/31/2025

relevant_sources.summary: The "Newell 2024 Corporate Citizenship Report" provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. This company-owned report details the AI Executive Steering Committee, AI Governance Board, and AI Security Policy, indicating a centralized governance structure. Furthermore, it describes AI system use cases and capabilities, demonstrating transparency in their application for generating insights and ideas.
relevant_sources.title: Newell 2024 Corporate Citizenship Report

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Published materials highlight the use of Generative AI and AI tools for innovation, and mention AI personas conducting research. Reports describe AI system use cases and capabilities, including their application for generating insights and ideas.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: This company-owned blog post, "Using AI to Power Innovation," provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. The post highlights the use of Generative AI and AI tools for innovation, and mentions AI personas conducting research, indicating transparency about AI capabilities and its application. However, the evidence focuses on aspirations and outcomes rather than detailing specific governance or operational aspects.
relevant_sources.title: Using AI to Power Innovation

relevant_sources.summary: The "Newell 2024 Corporate Citizenship Report" provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. This company-owned report details the AI Executive Steering Committee, AI Governance Board, and AI Security Policy, indicating a centralized governance structure. Furthermore, it describes AI system use cases and capabilities, demonstrating transparency in their application for generating insights and ideas.
relevant_sources.title: Newell 2024 Corporate Citizenship Report

summary.overall_findings: Drawing from 11 publicly available sources, Newell Brands' public disclosures include governance materials that indicate a policy-level commitment to managing risks associated with AI use. These materials, found in SEC filings, reiterate risks associated with AI use. Overall, this evidence addresses 1 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, and no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
